c.d: Diversity and utility of features supporting team communication, task management, file sharing, video conferencing, and real-time collaboration.
Ability to integrate with other productivity tools and platforms like Google Drive, Microsoft 365, Zoom, etc., to streamline workflows.

c.n: User Experience and Ease of Use
c.d: Intuitiveness of the app interface, navigation efficiency, and overall user-friendly design that facilitates adoption and regular use.
Level of security features suitable for privacy-conscious organizations, including data protection and user privacy controls.
Capability to serve both small teams and large organizations with flexible upgrade options and feature sets.
Availability of free versions or free trials and pricing tiers for professional or enterprise features.
